title: Make Magic - New Favorite Portable Printer!
excerpt: So excited about Prynt Pocket , which turns your iPhone into an instant printer! We launched my favorite color, mint, in the shop (you can also get grey) and for a limited time you'll get 50 films with the bundle!…
body:
So excited about Prynt Pocket, which turns your iPhone into an instant printer! We launched my favorite color, mint, in the shop (you can also get grey) and for a limited time you'll get 50 films with the bundle! It makes documenting on-the-go super fun!

Hoping to put more cool stuff like this in our shop. Thanks as always for your enthusiasm and support. You all rock. Let me know if you have any questions about the Prynt Pocket! And be sure to pre-order by the 28th so you can take advantage of the bundle!
